---
#title: "Maths"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "number_theory/*.qmd"
    - "calculus/*.qmd"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
---

Welcome to my maths notes! This site tracks my progress through various online courses, covering everything from number theory to calculus.

Courses I have taken include:

- [A-level Mathematics](https://learning.edx.org/course/course-v1:ImperialX+alm001+3T2018/home) by ImperialX on [edX](https://home.edx.org)
